research.title: Claude Code Hooks & Custom Agents: Build AI Pipelines That Run Themselves
research.whyTrending: Claude Code hooks expanded to 24 events with 4 handler types in March 2026. Top articles on the blog are Claude Code series (392+275 views). Hooks are the automation layer most tutorials skip.

secondaryKeywords: how to build claude code pipeline
seo.suggestedTitle: Claude Code Hooks & Custom Agents: Build AI Pipelines That Run Themselves

gaps: No article combines hooks AND custom agents into unified pipeline patterns
Nobody covers the exit-code-2 gotcha with real debugging stories
No comparison of when to use hooks vs skills vs agents
Agent hooks (type: agent) barely covered anywhere
strengths: Official docs are comprehensive on individual events
DataCamp tutorial has good beginner examples

strategy.angle: Hooks are the missing automation layer that turns Claude Code from assistant to self-running pipeline
strategy.title: Claude Code Hooks & Custom Agents: Build AI Pipelines That Run Themselves
strategy.excerpt: Claude Code has 24 lifecycle hooks, 4 handler types, and custom agents — but every tutorial covers them separately. Here's how to wire them into production pipelines that auto-format, validate, and enforce quality without you lifting a finger.
